title: Legacy Console Edition
description: Wish You Could Go Back to The Past? Welcome To The Center Of Nostalgia, relive your experiences like you are on your old ps3/xbox 360
body:
Welcome to the Legacy Console Modpack, a nostalgic journey back to the beloved Legacy Console Edition, now enhanced with multiplayer support (Multiplayer modpack Required) and exciting new content additions (different modpack required). Explore familiar landscapes and features from the console version, now optimized for multiplayer gameplay and enriched with fresh experiences.

Features:

Legacy Console Edition Features: Rediscover classic elements from the Legacy Console Edition, including iconic structures, gameplay mechanics, and more.
Multiplayer Support: Team up with friends and conquer challenges together in a multiplayer environment, fostering a sense of community and collaboration. (requires the multiplayer modpack)
Enhanced Content: Immerse yourself in new adventures with added content that expands the original gameplay experience, offering surprises at every turn.
Modpack Version:

Legacy Console Extra Modpack v1.0: Initial release featuring Legacy Console Edition features, multiplayer support, and the first wave of additional content.
Installation Instructions:

Download and install the latest version of your game.
Download the Legacy Console+ Modpack v1.0 from Modrinth.
Follow the installation instructions provided in the modpack to enjoy the enhanced gameplay experience.

report any issues here:[https://discord.gg/FbssKEnRZw](https://discord.gg/FbssKEnRZw)
